Milos.name: Milos
Milos.description: Volcanic island known for Sarakiniko, Kleftiko, and colorful fishing villages

Koufonisia.name: Koufonisia
Koufonisia.description: Tiny Small Cyclades island with crystal waters, walkable, ~20 accommodations total

Santorini.name: Santorini
Santorini.description: Iconic caldera views, Oia sunset, wine tours

Naxos.name: Naxos
Naxos.description: Largest Cycladic island, long sandy beaches, mountain villages

Paros.name: Paros
Paros.description: Naoussa village, windsurfing, traditional Cycladic charm

Ios.name: Ios
Ios.description: Party island with beautiful Mylopotas beach

Sifnos.name: Sifnos
Sifnos.description: Foodie island, pottery, hiking trails between villages

Serifos.name: Serifos
Serifos.description: Rugged, unspoiled island with hilltop Chora

Amorgos.name: Amorgos
Amorgos.description: Remote eastern Cyclades, monastery, Le Grand Bleu filming location

Rhodes.name: Rhodes
Rhodes.description: Medieval old town, Lindos, long beaches

Crete.name: Crete
Crete.description: Largest Greek island — Knossos, Samaria Gorge, Elafonisi

Corfu.name: Corfu
Corfu.description: Venetian old town, lush green landscapes, Paleokastritsa

Hydra.name: Hydra
Hydra.description: Car-free island, donkeys, art galleries, Athens day trip
